triples.subject: The Motley Fool
triples.sentence: Founded in 1993, The Motley Fool is a financial services company dedicated to making the world smarter, happier, and richer.

triples.subject: The Motley Fool
triples.sentence: The Motley Fool reaches millions of people every month through our premium investing solutions, free guidance and market analysis on Fool.com, personal finance education, top-rated podcasts, and non-profit The Motley Fool Foundation.

triples.subject: China's BYD
triples.sentence: China's BYD (OTC:BYDDY) is the largest EV manufacturer in the world by unit sales and is the fastest growing major automaker.

triples.subject: Tesla
triples.sentence: Tesla, Ford, and General Motors are all members of the S&P 500 index.
